name: Savory Bell Pepper Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 1/4 cups all-purpose flour and 1/2 teaspoon salt. Cut in 1/3 cup butter and 2 tablespoons lard until the mixture forms coarse crumbs.
2. Beat 1 egg slightly and add to the flour mixture. Stir with a fork until the pastry clings together.
3. Shape into a ball. Roll out on a floured surface to match the pan size.
4. Line a quiche pan with pastry, trimming the edge flush with the rim.
5. Wash peppers, cut in halves, and remove seeds. Sauté peppers and onion in butter until soft but not browned.
6. Remove from heat. Add garlic and basil leaves.
7. Prebake pie shell for about 10 minutes in a preheated oven at 400°F.
8. Spread pepper mixture evenly in quiche pastry.
9. Beat eggs and half and half. Add grated cheese.
10. Pour the mixture over peppers.
11. Bake at 350°F for about 35 minutes until filling is set and top is nicely browned.
12. Let stand a few minutes before cutting into wedges.
